particulars.description: F/H littlesea industrial estate, lynch lane, weymouth, dorset;. Together with all buildings & fixtures (including trade fixtures). Fixed plant & machinery by way of fixed charge, all present & future book & other debts, floating charge over all moveable plant machinery, implements, utensils, furniture & equipment by way of assignment. The goodwill of the business (if any), the full benefit of all licences & guarantees.. See image for full details.

secured_details.description: All monies due or to become due from the company to the chargee on any account whatsoever

particulars.description: Fixed and floating charge over the undertaking and all property and assets present and future, including goodwill, book debts, uncalled capital, buildings, fixtures, fixed plant & machinery.
